infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Transvert uses the camera to scan foreign text, menus, receipts and prices before you pay.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Transvert lets you import travel images for OCR, translation and real-cost analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Transvert can save shared scan previews if you choose to export them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Transvert will use your location to find low-fee ATMs nearby when ATM intelligence is enabled.
